sqls.name: temp_view_1
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW temp_view_1 AS SELECT crop_production_data.District, AVG(crop_production_data.Yield (quintals)) AS avg_yield FROM crop_production_data GROUP BY crop_production_data.District

sqls.name: temp_view_2
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW temp_view_2 AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.District, soil_analysis_data.Organic Matter (%), soil_analysis_data.Soil Type, crop_production_data.Yield (quintals) FROM soil_analysis_data JOIN crop_production_data ON soil_analysis_data.District = crop_production_data.District

sqls.name: temp_view_3
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW temp_view_3 AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.Soil Type, soil_analysis_data.Nitrogen Content (kg/ha), soil_analysis_data.Phosphorus Content (kg/ha), soil_analysis_data.Potassium Content (kg/ha) FROM soil_analysis_data

sqls.name: temp_view_4
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW temp_view_4 AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.Soil Type, crop_production_data.Crop, AVG(crop_production_data.Yield (quintals)) AS avg_yield FROM soil_analysis_data JOIN crop_production_data ON soil_analysis_data.District = crop_production_data.District GROUP BY soil_analysis_data.Soil Type, crop_production_data.Crop
